item.title: DNA Helped Solve This Missing Teen's Case
item.description: A missing teen case was solved with the help of DNA, highlighting the role of forensic evidence in bringing answers to a long-unsolved investigation.

media:content.media:title: DNA Helped Solve This Missing Teen's Case
media:content.media:description: A missing teen case was solved with the help of DNA, highlighting the role of forensic evidence in bringing answers to a long-unsolved investigation.

item.title: He Tried to Claim His Innocence
item.description: Examine a case where the accused maintains innocence, focusing on the investigation, evidence presented, and legal proceedings.

media:content.media:description: Examine a case where the accused maintains innocence, focusing on the investigation, evidence presented, and legal proceedings.

item.title: A Mother’s Search for Aiden Clune
item.description: Follow the ongoing search and investigation involving Aiden Clune, focusing on the timeline, efforts by family and authorities, and available updates.
